name: Chicken Cacciatore Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
3 boned and skinned chicken breast halves, cut into 2-inch pieces
8 ounce can mushroom pieces and stems, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in an electric cooker pot.
2. Mix well.
3. Cover and cook on Low setting for at least 6 hours.
